jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive - Benelux
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><div><strong>What We're Building</strong></div><div>Honeycomb is a service for the near and present future, defining observability and raising expectations of what developer tools can do!&nbsp;We're working with well known companies like HelloFresh, Slack, LaunchDarkly, and Vanguard.</div></div><p><strong>Who We Are:</strong></p><p>The Sales team at Honeycomb partners with engineering leaders to roll out observability across their organisations.</p>

jobs.title: Staff Solution Architect
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><div><strong>What We're Building</strong></div><div>Honeycomb's Finance & Accounting team supports the company's operating cadence with rigorous reporting and revenue accounting practices.</div></div><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Staff Solution Architect partners with strategic accounts to deliver architectural guidance for Honeycomb deployments at scale.</p>
